title: Potato Peeler for Kitchen, Sharp Stainless Steel Vegetable Peeler with Potato Eye Remover, Ergonomic Non-Slip Handle Y Peelers
features: 🥕【Quality Material】Our veg peeler is with zinc alloy one piece die-casting, which is more stable and less likely to break than ordinary material peelers. The blades are made of stainless steel anti-bacterial 420 blades, which are more secure to use.

🥔【Safe and Non-Slip】The thickened non-slip handle of the potatoes peelers is designed with a thumb rest, easy to hold and comfortable and safe use. Hanging hole design for easy drying and hanging storage to prevent bacteria growth.

🍎【Super Sharp】The sharp movable blade of the y peeler, with adjustable angle, can quickly peel the skin to reduce the trouble of jamming.V-shaped gouge design, easy to remove the bud eye, making your kitchen work more efficient.

🥒【Multifunctional Peelers】The stainless steel easy peelers is versatile and ideal for everyday peeling and slicing use, and can peel a variety of soft and hard vegetables and fruits, tomatoes, cucumbers, carrots, potatoes, apples, etc.
🍅【Easy to Clean】This mirror polished speed peeler is easy to clean and lasts longer, making it an ideal tool kitchen essentials.
description: From the manufacturer PRODUCT ADVANTAGES Stainless Steel 420 Blade Easy to Clean Super Sharp Non-Breakable Anti-Slip Handle Hanging Hole Design PRODUCT DETAILS Product size: 16*5.5*1cm Product weight: 70g Package size: 18*6*2.5cm Packing weight: 70g Colour: Silver Material: Stainless Steel + Zinc Alloy This peeler is one of the essential tools for your kitchen. It increases your efficiency and makes cooking tasks easier, making it a high-quality and practical choice.
